assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes a recurring_window block with 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' for Saturday maintenance windows from 02:00-06:00 UTC

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The script includes gcloud container clusters update with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence='FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes dynamic maintenance_exclusion blocks for quarterly freezes with defined start/end times, though periods are shorter than 30 days

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Both Terraform and script configure a November audit exclusion from '2024-11-01T00:00:00Z' to '2024-11-30T23:59:59Z'

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention or recommend using Stable or Extended release channels for better upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The script shows gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods
